CREATE TYPE many_things AS STRUCT (k INTEGER, l VARCHAR);
CREATE TYPE one_thing AS UNION (number INTEGER, string VARCHAR);
CREATE TYPE complex_type AS STRUCT (id INTEGER, details STRUCT (name VARCHAR, age INTEGER));
CREATE TYPE measurement AS STRUCT (height FLOAT, weight FLOAT, unit VARCHAR);
CREATE TYPE alternative AS UNION (int_val INTEGER, str_val VARCHAR, bool_val BOOLEAN);
CREATE TYPE record AS STRUCT (id INTEGER, attributes ARRAY<STRING>);
CREATE TYPE nested_union AS UNION (name VARCHAR, data STRUCT (val1 INTEGER, val2 FLOAT));
CREATE TYPE entity AS STRUCT (entity_id INTEGER, entity_type VARCHAR);
CREATE TYPE settings AS STRUCT (key VARCHAR, value VARCHAR);
CREATE TYPE nested_struct AS STRUCT (coord STRUCT (x FLOAT, y FLOAT), label VARCHAR);
CREATE TYPE mixed_union AS UNION (text VARCHAR, number INTEGER, descriptor STRUCT (feature VARCHAR, value INT));
